name: small private practice medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small private practice medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of patient data and medical codes.
target_audience: small private practice medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month
problem_solved: inaccurate billing and coding leading to delayed payments
features: manual data entry for patient information
basic error checking for medical codes

locked_fields.primary_user: small private practice medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: inaccurate billing and coding leading to delayed payments
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small private practice medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of patient data and medical codes.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of patient data and medical codes
must_have_features: manual data entry for patient information
basic error checking for medical codes

one_liner: For small private practice medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of patient data and medical codes.
